modules.name: gcal_manager.account
documentation: Store and retrieve Google Account information.

functions.name: gcal_manager.account.get
documentation: Return accounts that have been registered.

functions.name: gcal_manager.account.register
documentation: Add account to the set of known accounts.

functions.name: gcal_manager.account.remove
documentation: Remove account from the set of known accounts.

classes.name: gcal_manager.account.Account
documentation: A class to represent a Google Account.

modules.name: gcal_manager.context
documentation: Store and retrieve contexts.

functions.name: gcal_manager.context.get
documentation: Return contexts.

functions.name: gcal_manager.context.register
documentation: Add context to the set of known contexts.

functions.name: gcal_manager.context.remove
documentation: Remove context from the set of known contexts.

classes.name: gcal_manager.context.Context
documentation: A class to represent a context.

modules.name: gcal_manager.calendar
documentation: Store and retrieve Google Calendar information.

functions.name: gcal_manager.calendar.get
documentation: Return all calendars associated with an account.

functions.name: gcal_manager.calendar.remove
documentation: Remove calendar from the set of known calendars.

classes.name: gcal_manager.calendar.Calendar
documentation: A class to represent a Google Calendar.

modules.name: gcal_manager
documentation: Add, edit or delete events from your Google Calendars.

modules.name: gcal_manager.event
documentation: Store and retrieve Google Calendar events.

functions.name: gcal_manager.event.get
documentation: Return all events.

functions.name: gcal_manager.event.search
documentation: Return all events matching search criteria.

functions.name: gcal_manager.event.create
documentation: Add event to Google Calendar.

functions.name: gcal_manager.event.delete
documentation: Remove event from Google Calendar.

classes.name: gcal_manager.event.Event
documentation: A class to represent an event on a Google Calendar.

modules.name: gcal_manager.task
documentation: Store and retrieve task templates.

functions.name: gcal_manager.task.get
documentation: Return all task templates.

functions.name: gcal_manager.task.search
documentation: Return all task templates matching search criteria.

functions.name: gcal_manager.task.create
documentation: Add task template to available templates.

functions.name: gcal_manager.task.delete
documentation: Remove task template for available templates.

classes.name: gcal_manager.task.Task
documentation: A class to represent a task template.
